name: reference-legal-intake-v0
description: Reference profile for a hypothetical governed legal intake conversational agent. Vendor-neutral example, not a Keystone-internal service, and not tied to any real law firm or case data. The agent gathers intake facts (case details, jurisdiction, urgency) and escalates to a licensed intake specialist rather than giving legal advice or crossing into the unauthorized practice of law. It describes how to read the agent's response fields so the harness can score cases.
